title: keteleeria fortunei subsp. cyclolepis
intro: Keteleeria fortunei subsp. cyclolepis, also known as the Chinese fir, is a coniferous tree species native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Keteleeria fortunei subsp. cyclolepis include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
